name: bindery-mcp
description: Book authoring tools for Claude Desktop: chapter navigation, full-text search, typography formatting, and export. Works with any Bindery markdown book project.

ollama_url.title: Ollama URL (optional)
ollama_url.description: If you run Ollama locally, set this to enable semantic reranking (e.g. http://localhost:11434). Leave empty to use fast lexical-only search, which works well for most books.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Check workspace status: settings, search index, and embedding backend.

tools.name: index_build
tools.description: Build or rebuild the full-text search index. Run once after cloning, then as needed.

tools.name: index_status
tools.description: Show current index metadata: chunk count and build time.

tools.name: retrieve_context
tools.description: Find the most relevant passages for a query. Use for 'where did X happen' or 'what did character Y say about Z'.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text BM25 search across all story and notes files. Returns ranked snippets with file paths and line numbers.

tools.name: get_text
tools.description: Read a source file by relative path, optionally restricted to a line range.

tools.name: get_chapter
tools.description: Fetch the full content of a chapter by number and language code (e.g. EN or NL).

tools.name: get_overview
tools.description: List the chapter structure (acts, chapters, titles) for one or all languages.

tools.name: get_notes
tools.description: Read from Notes/ and Details_*.md, optionally filtered by category or character name.

tools.name: format
tools.description: Apply typography formatting (curly quotes, em-dashes, ellipses) to a file or folder.

description: Semantic search, retrieval, and book management tools for markdown book projects. Provides hybrid BM25 + vector search, chapter navigation, typography formatting, and DOCX/EPUB export.

wsl_binary.title: WSL Binary Path
wsl_binary.description: Full path to the compiled bindery-mcp binary inside WSL (e.g. /home/user/bindery_source/target/release/bindery-mcp)

source_root.title: Source Repository
source_root.description: Path to the repository root containing your Story/ folder (e.g. C:\Users\YourUser\MyBook or /mnt/c/Users/YourUser/MyBook)

work_root.title: Work Directory
work_root.description: Workspace for synced content and indexing. Use a fast local filesystem (e.g. WSL ext4 path like /home/user/bindery_work)

index_dir.title: Index Directory
index_dir.description: Where lexical and vector indices are stored (e.g. /home/user/bindery_cache/.bindery/index)

embeddings_backend.title: Embeddings Backend
embeddings_backend.description: Embedding backend: onnx, ollama, or none

onnx_url.title: ONNX Server URL
onnx_url.description: Full URL override for the ONNX embedding server. Leave empty to auto-detect the Windows host IP at startup.

onnx_port.title: ONNX Server Port
onnx_port.description: Port the ONNX server listens on. Used with auto-detected IP if ONNX Server URL is not set.

onnx_server_dir.title: ONNX Server Directory
onnx_server_dir.description: Windows path to standalone ONNX server install (for auto-start)

libreoffice_path.title: LibreOffice Path
libreoffice_path.description: Path to the LibreOffice executable for PDF export. On WSL/Linux (default): 'libreoffice'. On Windows: full path to soffice.exe, e.g. C:\Program Files\LibreOffice\program\soffice.exe

tools.name: health
tools.description: Return health and diagnostics for the MCP server

tools.name: retrieve_context
tools.description: Hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector) for story context. Use language=EN, NL, or ALL.

tools.name: get_text
tools.description: Read text by identifier from the source repo

tools.name: get_chapter
tools.description: Get a full chapter by number and language

tools.name: get_overview
tools.description: Get an overview of acts and chapters

tools.name: get_notes
tools.description: Get an entry from Notes/Details_Notes.md

tools.name: get_review_text
tools.description: Return git diff from the source repo (EN/NL/ALL)

tools.name: search
tools.description: Literal or regex search under the source repo

tools.name: index_build
tools.description: Build or rebuild lexical/vector indices for all languages

tools.name: index_status
tools.description: Return index status and metadata

tools.name: sync_workspace
tools.description: Sync workspace files between source and work directories

tools.name: format
tools.description: Format typography in markdown files under the source repo

tools.name: merge
tools.description: Merge markdown chapters into a book, optionally exporting DOCX/EPUB

tools.name: task_status
tools.description: Check status of background tasks
